name: Test.Sequence

unions.name: Sequence
unions.comment: Represents sequence of tests with its result `a`.

values.name: andThen
values.type: (a -> Test.Sequence.Sequence b) -> Test.Sequence.Sequence a -> Test.Sequence.Sequence b

values.name: assert
values.type: String.String -> (a -> Expect.Expectation) -> Test.Sequence.Sequence a -> Test.Sequence.Sequence a

values.name: describe
values.comment: Apply a description to the given sequence of tests.

values.name: fail
values.comment:
`Sequence` that always fails.

    import Expect

    someSequence
        |> andThen
            (\str ->
                case String.toInt str of
                    Nothing ->
                        fail "Not an integer" <|
                            \() -> Expect.fail str
                    Just n ->
                        pass n
            )

values.name: namedCases
values.type: (a -> List.List ( String.String, Test.Sequence.Sequence () )) -> Test.Sequence.Sequence a -> Test.Sequence.Sequence ()

values.name: pass
values.comment: `Sequence` that always passes with specified value `a`.
